requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — General Luminaire (RCM / EESS + AS/NZS 60598)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——通用灯具（RCM / EESS + AS/NZS 60598）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——通用燈具（RCM / EESS + AS/NZS 60598）

summary.en: LED luminaires supplied in Australia must satisfy electrical safety obligations under applicable state and territory electrical safety laws and the Electrical Equipment Safety System (EESS) where the equipment is in scope. The mandatory obligation is the Australian electrical safety law/EESS framework and RCM supply pathway; AS/NZS 60598 is the technical luminaire safety standard commonly used as evidence in the compliance folder. Requirements cover protection against electric shock, insulation, creepage and clearance, thermal endurance, mechanical strength, wiring, terminals, markings, and instructions.
summary.zh: 在澳大利亚供应的 LED 灯具须满足适用州和领地电气安全法律及纳入范围时的 Electrical Equipment Safety System（EESS）义务。强制义务来自澳大利亚电气安全法律/EESS 框架及 RCM 供应路径；AS/NZS 60598 是通常用于合规文件夹证据的灯具安全技术标准。要求涵盖防触电、绝缘、爬电距离和电气间隙、耐热、机械强度、布线、端子、标志和说明书。
summary.zht: 在澳洲供應的 LED 燈具須滿足適用州和領地電氣安全法律及納入範圍時的 Electrical Equipment Safety System（EESS）義務。強制義務來自澳洲電氣安全法律/EESS 框架及 RCM 供應路徑；AS/NZS 60598 是通常用於合規文件夾證據的燈具安全技術標準。要求涵蓋防觸電、絕緣、爬電距離和電氣間隙、耐熱、機械強度、佈線、端子、標誌和說明書。

standards_or_laws: Australian state and territory electrical safety legislation and the Electrical Equipment Safety System (EESS)

summary.en: China commonly uses GB 7000.1 and the relevant GB 7000 part for luminaire safety, with CCC certification required for many domestic-market luminaires. GB 7000.1 is based on IEC 60598-1, but CCC certification, Chinese-language reports, and Chinese factory-inspection records are separate from Australian responsible-supplier and RCM evidence obligations.
summary.zh: 中国通常使用 GB 7000.1 及相应 GB 7000 分标准处理灯具安全，许多面向中国国内市场的灯具须取得 CCC 认证。GB 7000.1 以 IEC 60598-1 为基础，但 CCC 认证、中文报告及中国工厂检查记录与澳大利亚责任供应商和 RCM 证据义务相互独立。
summary.zht: 中國通常使用 GB 7000.1 及相應 GB 7000 分標準處理燈具安全，許多面向中國國內市場的燈具須取得 CCC 認證。GB 7000.1 以 IEC 60598-1 為基礎，但 CCC 認證、中文報告及中國工廠檢查記錄與澳洲責任供應商和 RCM 證據義務相互獨立。

standards_or_laws: GB 7000.1 — Luminaires — Part 1: General requirements and tests
CNCA-C10-01 — CCC certification rules for luminaires

gap.en: Australia requires an Australian responsible supplier and market-supply records, and the equipment level under EESS may affect registration and certification evidence. Existing CCC reports may help engineering review but should be mapped to AS/NZS 60598 clauses, Australian deviations, voltage/frequency, plug/cord requirements, markings, and English instructions before relying on them in an Australian compliance folder.
gap.zh: 澳大利亚要求澳大利亚责任供应商及市场供应记录，EESS 下的设备等级可能影响注册及认证证据。现有 CCC 报告可辅助工程审查，但在纳入澳大利亚合规文件夹前，应逐条映射 AS/NZS 60598 条款、澳大利亚偏差、电压/频率、插头/电源线要求、标志及英文说明书。
gap.zht: 澳洲要求澳洲責任供應商及市場供應記錄，EESS 下的設備等級可能影響註冊及認證證據。現有 CCC 報告可輔助工程審查，但在納入澳洲合規文件夾前，應逐條映射 AS/NZS 60598 條款、澳洲偏差、電壓/頻率、插頭/電源線要求、標誌及英文說明書。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — electrical safety law/EESS and RCM supply obligations apply before Australian supply; AS/NZS 60598 is the commonly used technical evidence standard
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for many domestic-market luminaires — CCC certification under CNCA-C10-01 with GB 7000.1 and relevant GB 7000 parts

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Australian supply cannot be cleared by Chinese CCC alone. The Australian responsible supplier should classify the luminaire under EESS, keep AS/NZS 60598 evidence, resolve Australian deviations, and apply RCM/registration steps where required.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 【仅供参考】仅凭中国 CCC 不能完成澳大利亚供应合规。澳大利亚责任供应商应在 EESS 下确定灯具等级，保存 AS/NZS 60598 证据，处理澳大利亚偏差，并在要求时完成 RCM/注册步骤。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 【僅供參考】僅憑中國 CCC 不能完成澳洲供應合規。澳洲責任供應商應在 EESS 下確定燈具等級，保存 AS/NZS 60598 證據，處理澳洲偏差，並在要求時完成 RCM/註冊步驟。
